info.name: Platform — Subscriptions
info.description: Platform admin endpoints for managing tenant subscriptions. All requests require a platform admin bearer token. Routes are nested under /tenants/:tenantId/subscriptions.

request.description:
Create a subscription for a tenant. Fails if the tenant already has a non-terminal subscription (trialing/active/past_due).

Status logic:
- If tenant.isTrialActive = true AND tenant.trialEndsAt is in the future → status = trialing
- Otherwise → status = active

response.name: 201 Created
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Subscription created successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "clsub001",
    "tenantId": "cltenant001",
    "status": "trialing",
    "startsAt": "2026-04-16T10:00:00.000Z",
    "endsAt": null,
    "trialEndsAt": "2026-04-30T10:00:00.000Z",
    "canceledAt": null,
    "createdAt": "2026-04-16T10:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-04-16T10:00:00.000Z",
    "plan": {
      "id": "clplan001",
      "code": "starter-monthly",
      "name": "Starter Monthly",
      "billingInterval": "monthly",
      "price": "199.00",
      "currency": "EGP",
      "trialDays": 14
    },
    "tenant": {
      "id": "cltenant001",
      "nameEn": "Al Shifa Pharmacy",
      "nameAr": "صيدلية الشفاء",
      "status": "active",
      "isTrialActive": true,
      "trialEndsAt": "2026-04-30T10:00:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}

response.name: 409 Already has active subscription

request.description: Same request body but for a tenant whose trial has already expired. The resulting subscription will have status = active.
List all subscriptions for a tenant, ordered by createdAt descending. Full subscription history.
List canceled subscriptions to view history.
Returns the most recent subscription with a non-terminal status (trialing | active | past_due). Returns 404 if the tenant has no active subscription.

response.name: 200 OK — current trialing subscription
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "OK",
  "data": {
    "id": "clsub001",
    "tenantId": "cltenant001",
    "status": "trialing",
    "startsAt": "2026-04-16T10:00:00.000Z",
    "endsAt": null,
    "trialEndsAt": "2026-04-30T10:00:00.000Z",
    "canceledAt": null,
    "createdAt": "2026-04-16T10:00:00.000Z",
    "updatedAt": "2026-04-16T10:00:00.000Z",
    "plan": {
      "id": "clplan001",
      "code": "starter-monthly",
      "name": "Starter Monthly",
      "billingInterval": "monthly",
      "price": "199.00",
      "currency": "EGP",
      "trialDays": 14
    },
    "tenant": {
      "id": "cltenant001",
      "nameEn": "Al Shifa Pharmacy",
      "nameAr": "صيدلية الشفاء",
      "status": "active",
      "isTrialActive": true,
      "trialEndsAt": "2026-04-30T10:00:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}

request.description:
Change the tenant's subscription plan. Runs in a transaction:
1. Cancel the current subscription
2. Create a new one with the new plan

Trial carry-over: if the tenant is still in trial, the new subscription inherits the trial status and trialEndsAt.

response.name: 200 OK — plan changed (active)
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Subscription changed successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "clsub002",
    "tenantId": "cltenant001",
    "status": "active",
    "startsAt": "2026-04-20T10:00:00.000Z",
    "endsAt": null,
    "trialEndsAt": null,
    "canceledAt": null,
    "plan": {
      "id": "clplan002",
      "code": "pro-monthly",
      "name": "Pro Monthly",
      "billingInterval": "monthly",
      "price": "499.00",
      "currency": "EGP",
      "trialDays": 0
    },
    "tenant": {
      "id": "cltenant001",
      "nameEn": "Al Shifa Pharmacy",
      "nameAr": "صيدلية الشفاء",
      "status": "active",
      "isTrialActive": false,
      "trialEndsAt": "2026-04-30T10:00:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}

response.name: 409 Already on this plan

request.description:
Cancel the tenant's current subscription. Runs in a transaction:
1. Set status = canceled, canceledAt = now, endsAt = now
2. If the subscription was trialing, also sets tenant.isTrialActive = false

No request body needed.

response.name: 200 OK — canceled
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Subscription canceled successfully",
  "data": {
    "id": "clsub001",
    "tenantId": "cltenant001",
    "status": "canceled",
    "startsAt": "2026-04-16T10:00:00.000Z",
    "endsAt": "2026-04-20T10:00:00.000Z",
    "trialEndsAt": "2026-04-30T10:00:00.000Z",
    "canceledAt": "2026-04-20T10:00:00.000Z",
    "plan": {
      "id": "clplan001",
      "code": "starter-monthly",
      "name": "Starter Monthly",
      "billingInterval": "monthly",
      "price": "199.00",
      "currency": "EGP",
      "trialDays": 14
    },
    "tenant": {
      "id": "cltenant001",
      "nameEn": "Al Shifa Pharmacy",
      "nameAr": "صيدلية الشفاء",
      "status": "active",
      "isTrialActive": false,
      "trialEndsAt": "2026-04-30T10:00:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}

request.description: Same cancel but with Accept-Language: ar. Success message will be in Arabic.
